Name: Hold the Line
Description: ARMY RULE — attached to units via unit Children[]. All units in this army may re-roll Break tests if they are within 12 inches of a Hero.

Name: Rank Bonus
Description: ARMY RULE — attached to units via unit Children[]. This unit adds +1 Attack for every full rank of 5 or more models behind the first.

Name: Lance Formation
Description: ARMY RULE — attached to units via unit Children[]. When charging, all models in this unit fight in the first two ranks instead of one.

Name: Frenzy
Description: UNIT RULE — attached to statlines via statline Children[]. This model must always charge if able. Gains +1 Attack while Frenzied.

Name: Cause Fear
Description: UNIT RULE — attached to statlines via statline Children[]. Enemy units must pass a Leadership test before charging this model, or they cannot charge.

Name: Spellcaster
Description: UNIT RULE — attached to statlines via statline Children[]. This model may cast spells. Requires a Magic Staff in its profile to gain +1 to casting rolls.
